creator: dragonsa@highveldmail.co.za
text:
The cursor theme based on the KDE crystal theme.  This cursor is on kde-look.org and distributed with openSUSE (which has it as default).  The port does install the "blue" theme as default (and thus could possibly conflict with future cursor ports, no current ports install a default theme).  

The source files are hard to come by as the author is no longer hosting them however some sites appear to be reliable (is it possible FreeBSD.org could host the file?  Not imperative though, more prudent).  

Enjoy :-)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
